Feature Request

Thank you for helping improve Dearog Password Manager.

Please provide as much information as possible so the feature can be properly evaluated.

---

Feature Summary

Provide a short title for your feature request.

---

Problem Statement

Describe the problem you are trying to solve.

Examples:

- What is difficult today?
- What is missing?
- Why is the current behavior insufficient?

---

Proposed Solution

Describe your proposed solution in detail.

Explain:

- How it should work
- Where it should appear
- How users would interact with it

---

Alternative Solutions

Describe any alternative approaches you have considered.

---

Use Cases

Explain when users would use this feature.

Examples:

- Daily workflow
- Security improvements
- Productivity
- Accessibility
- Performance

---

Benefits

What benefits would this feature provide?

Examples:

- Better usability
- Improved security
- Faster workflow
- Better accessibility
- Easier maintenance

---

Feature Category

Select one or more categories.

- [ ] Authentication
- [ ] Password Vault
- [ ] Password Generator
- [ ] Password Health
- [ ] Secure Notes
- [ ] Payment Cards
- [ ] Documents
- [ ] Passkeys
- [ ] TOTP
- [ ] Android Autofill
- [ ] Backup
- [ ] Restore
- [ ] Import
- [ ] Export
- [ ] Search
- [ ] Categories
- [ ] Tags
- [ ] Notifications
- [ ] Widgets
- [ ] Settings
- [ ] Accessibility
- [ ] Performance
- [ ] UI / UX
- [ ] Security
- [ ] Other

---

Priority

How important is this feature?

- [ ] Low
- [ ] Medium
- [ ] High
- [ ] Critical

---

Mockups or References

If available, attach:

- Screenshots
- Wireframes
- Design mockups
- Example applications
- Reference links

---

Additional Notes

Include any extra information that may help explain the feature request.

---

Checklist

- [ ] I searched existing issues before creating this request.
- [ ] This feature has not already been requested.
- [ ] I have provided enough information for the maintainers to evaluate the proposal.
- [ ] I understand that submitting a feature request does not guarantee implementation.

---

Thank you for helping shape the future of Dearog Password Manager.
